name: Perplexity
useCase: AI search research and citation discovery
freeAccess: Free access available; limits can change.
bestFor: Finding how answer engines summarize topics and sources.
geoValue: Useful for checking which sources are cited in AI-style answers.

name: ChatGPT
useCase: Drafting, rewriting, and structured content ideation
freeAccess: Free access available; limits can change.
bestFor: Generating answer blocks, outlines, FAQs, and editorial variants.
geoValue: Useful for testing whether page explanations are clear enough to summarize.

name: Claude
useCase: Long-form content editing and document analysis
freeAccess: Free access availability can change by region and plan.
bestFor: Editing long pages, briefs, and comparison content.
geoValue: Useful for stress-testing clarity, limitations, and entity descriptions.

name: Google Gemini
useCase: Research, drafting, and Google ecosystem workflows
freeAccess: Free access available; limits can change.
bestFor: Drafting content and comparing search-facing copy variants.
geoValue: Useful for testing whether a page summary works across AI assistants.

name: Ahrefs Free SEO Tools
freeAccess: Free tools available; product limits can change.
bestFor: Checking keyword ideas and SEO opportunities before writing.
geoValue: Supports topic selection for pages that answer high-intent questions.

name: Semrush
useCase: SEO research, content planning, and competitor analysis
freeAccess: Free trial or limited access can vary.
bestFor: Commercial keyword research and competitive content planning.
geoValue: Helps identify topics where a precise answer page can compete.

name: SE Ranking
useCase: Rank tracking, keyword research, and SEO reporting
bestFor: Tracking search growth after publishing GEO-focused pages.
geoValue: Useful for pairing classic search metrics with AI visibility work.

name: Mangools
freeAccess: Limited free access or trial can vary.
bestFor: Simple keyword and SERP checks for small sites.
geoValue: Helps prioritize pages that can become answerable entities.

name: Surfer
freeAccess: Trial and plan details can change.
bestFor: Building structured content briefs for competitive topics.
geoValue: Useful for turning keyword research into question-led sections.

name: Grammarly
useCase: Writing clarity, grammar, and tone checks
freeAccess: Free plan available; limits can change.
bestFor: Improving clarity before publishing informational pages.
geoValue: Clearer language is easier for AI systems to summarize accurately.

name: Canva
useCase: Visual assets for social traffic and content upgrades
freeAccess: Free plan available; limits can change.
bestFor: Creating lead magnets, checklists, and shareable visuals.
geoValue: Supports content packaging and distribution beyond search.

name: Buffer
bestFor: Republishing answer blocks and tool updates across social channels.
geoValue: Distribution can help new pages get discovered and referenced.
